inline_comments.message: You probably shouldn't use :latest in blueprints and descriptors. In a few months :latest will point to ElAlto image. For now you can use your snapshot project version. After release switch to release version (will be tagged manually by Vijay&LF).

The reason for using defer is that by design reactive streams are lazy = they shouldn't do anything until a subscription is made. Hence you have two options here:

1. Wrap the whole method with single return Mono.defer and return these Mono.just without further wrapping - preferable because is lazy.
2. Get rid of these `Mono.defer`s if you thing the job to be done (if-logic) is minor overhead and the time of subscription doesn't matter - will violate laziness but may be justified.
